mapper.select: SELECT * FROM revenues ORDER BY year_month DESC, id
SELECT * FROM revenues WHERE year_month = #{yearMonth} ORDER BY id

SELECT d.id, d.name, NULL as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(gm.cost_rate), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate - gm.cost_rate * 1.35), 0) as total_profit, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((1 - (SUM(gm.cost_rate * 1.35) / SUM(a.billing_rate))) * 100, 2) END as profit_rate FROM departments d LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN engineer_grade_history egh ON egh.engineer_id = e.id AND egh.effective_from <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (egh.effective_to IS NULL OR egh.effective_to >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON gm.grade = egh.grade AND gm.sub_grade = egh.sub_grade LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) WHERE d.is_active = true GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY d.display_order, d.id

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT #{from} as ym UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CONCAT(ym, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') FROM month_series WHERE ym < #{to} ) SELECT d.id, d.name, NULL as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(gm.cost_rate), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate - gm.cost_rate * 1.35), 0) as total_profit, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((1 - (SUM(gm.cost_rate * 1.35) / SUM(a.billing_rate))) * 100, 2) END as profit_rate FROM departments d CROSS JOIN month_series ms LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN engineer_grade_history egh ON egh.engineer_id = e.id AND egh.effective_from <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (egh.effective_to IS NULL OR egh.effective_to >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON gm.grade = egh.grade AND gm.sub_grade = egh.sub_grade LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) WHERE d.is_active = true GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY d.display_order, d.id

SELECT g.id, g.name, d.name as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(gm.cost_rate), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate - gm.cost_rate * 1.35), 0) as total_profit, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((1 - (SUM(gm.cost_rate * 1.35) / SUM(a.billing_rate))) * 100, 2) END as profit_rate FROM `groups` g LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN engineer_grade_history egh ON egh.engineer_id = e.id AND egh.effective_from <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (egh.effective_to IS NULL OR egh.effective_to >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON gm.grade = egh.grade AND gm.sub_grade = egh.sub_grade LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) WHERE g.is_active = true GROUP BY g.id, g.name, d.name ORDER BY d.display_order, g.display_order, g.id

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT #{from} as ym UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CONCAT(ym, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') FROM month_series WHERE ym < #{to} ) SELECT g.id, g.name, d.name as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(gm.cost_rate), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate - gm.cost_rate * 1.35), 0) as total_profit, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((1 - (SUM(gm.cost_rate * 1.35) / SUM(a.billing_rate))) * 100, 2) END as profit_rate FROM `groups` g CROSS JOIN month_series ms LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN engineer_grade_history egh ON egh.engineer_id = e.id AND egh.effective_from <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (egh.effective_to IS NULL OR egh.effective_to >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON gm.grade = egh.grade AND gm.sub_grade = egh.sub_grade LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) WHERE g.is_active = true GROUP BY g.id, g.name, d.name ORDER BY d.display_order, g.display_order, g.id

SELECT e.id, e.name, g.name as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(gm.cost_rate), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate - gm.cost_rate * 1.35), 0) as total_profit, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((1 - (SUM(gm.cost_rate * 1.35) / SUM(a.billing_rate))) * 100, 2) END as profit_rate FROM engineers e LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN engineer_grade_history egh ON egh.engineer_id = e.id AND egh.effective_from <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (egh.effective_to IS NULL OR egh.effective_to >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON gm.grade = egh.grade AND gm.sub_grade = egh.sub_grade LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) GROUP BY e.id, e.name, g.name ORDER BY g.name, e.name

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT #{from} as ym UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CONCAT(ym, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') FROM month_series WHERE ym < #{to} ) SELECT e.id, e.name, g.name as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(gm.cost_rate), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate - gm.cost_rate * 1.35), 0) as total_profit, CASE WHEN COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND((1 - (SUM(gm.cost_rate * 1.35) / SUM(a.billing_rate))) * 100, 2) END as profit_rate FROM engineers e CROSS JOIN month_series ms LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN engineer_grade_history egh ON egh.engineer_id = e.id AND egh.effective_from <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (egh.effective_to IS NULL OR egh.effective_to >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON gm.grade = egh.grade AND gm.sub_grade = egh.sub_grade LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) GROUP BY e.id, e.name, g.name ORDER BY g.name, e.name

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT #{from} as ym UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CONCAT(ym, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') FROM month_series WHERE ym < #{to} ) SELECT ms.ym as year_month, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(gm.cost_rate), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate - gm.cost_rate * 1.35), 0) as total_profit FROM month_series ms LEFT JOIN engineers e ON 1=1 LEFT JOIN engineer_grade_history egh ON egh.engineer_id = e.id AND egh.effective_from <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (egh.effective_to IS NULL OR egh.effective_to >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) LEFT JOIN grade_masters gm ON gm.grade = egh.grade AND gm.sub_grade = egh.sub_grade LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) GROUP BY ms.ym ORDER BY ms.ym
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO revenues (year_month, assignment_id, revenue, cost, profit) VALUES (#{yearMonth}, #{assignmentId}, #{revenue}, #{cost}, #{profit})
mapper.update: UPDATE revenues SET year_month = #{yearMonth}, assignment_id = #{assignmentId}, revenue = #{revenue}, cost = #{cost}, profit = #{profit} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.name, NULL as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_profit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_profit, COALESCE(SUM((a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_profit FROM departments d LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) WHERE d.is_active = true GROUP BY d.id, d.name ORDER BY d.display_order, d.id

SELECT g.id, g.name, d.name as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_profit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_profit, COALESCE(SUM((a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_profit FROM `groups` g LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) WHERE g.is_active = true GROUP BY g.id, g.name, d.name ORDER BY d.display_order, g.display_order, g.id

SELECT e.id, e.name, g.name as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_profit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_profit, COALESCE(SUM((a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_profit FROM engineers e LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(#{yearMonth}, '-01')) GROUP BY e.id, e.name, g.name ORDER BY g.name, e.name

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT #{from} as ym UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CONCAT(ym, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') FROM month_series WHERE ym < #{to} ) SELECT ms.ym as `year_month`, NULL as id, '全社' as name, NULL as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_profit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_profit, COALESCE(SUM((a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_profit FROM month_series ms LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) GROUP BY ms.ym ORDER BY ms.ym

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT #{from} as ym UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CONCAT(ym, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') FROM month_series WHERE ym < #{to} ) SELECT ms.ym as `year_month`, d.id, d.name, NULL as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_profit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_profit, COALESCE(SUM((a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_profit FROM month_series ms CROSS JOIN departments d LEFT JOIN `groups` g ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) WHERE d.is_active = true GROUP BY ms.ym, d.id, d.name ORDER BY ms.ym, d.display_order, d.id

WITH RECURSIVE month_series AS ( SELECT #{from} as ym UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(CONCAT(ym, '-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y-%m') FROM month_series WHERE ym < #{to} ) SELECT ms.ym as `year_month`, g.id, g.name, d.name as parent_name, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(a.billing_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_revenue, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_cost, COALESCE(SUM(a.cost_rate * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'ACTIVE' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as confirmed_profit, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.status = 'PLANNED' THEN (a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160) ELSE 0 END), 0) as estimated_profit, COALESCE(SUM((a.billing_rate - a.cost_rate) * COALESCE(a.working_hours_per_month, 160)), 0) as total_profit FROM month_series ms CROSS JOIN `groups` g LEFT JOIN departments d ON g.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN engineers e ON e.group_id = g.id LEFT JOIN assignments a ON a.engineer_id = e.id AND a.status IN ('ACTIVE', 'PLANNED') AND a.start_date <= LAST_DAY(CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) AND (a.end_date IS NULL OR a.end_date >= CONCAT(ms.ym, '-01')) WHERE g.is_active = true GROUP BY ms.ym, g.id, g.name, d.name ORDER BY ms.ym, d.display_order, g.display_order, g.id
